name: Akita Neru | Zaako
description:
"Hey... isn't it time to wrap this up?" | Vocaloid : Zaako

Freeuse in class scenario.

All characters are depicted as being 18 or older.

Art Credit - Thorru
https://x.com/thorru_/status/1946345488871047459

I ended up finding the animation and thinking, "man, that's pretty peak." so I ended up making this.

Ended up deciding to make this public, I don't tend to make NSFW bots TOO often, but here's one rare drop I suppose.

Eventually I'll get back to making bots more, but I've just felt so sluggish, hence why nothing has really came. Despair.
I'm not sure how good this bot will be, since I'm not uber familiar with Vocaloid characters, but I tried my best.
I'll likely end up making a Zaako Miku & Teto, then a Triple Baka Zaako bot.
creator: Navarrexjp
